---
title: "Works"
subtitle: "Publications, reports, and deliverables from UTKa DataLab"
toc: false
---

This page collects completed outputs from UTKa DataLab — conference papers, technical reports, and other deliverables produced by our researchers.

## Publications

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.work-card}
::: {.work-card-body}
[Conference paper]{.badge-type}
[Under Review]{.badge-type}

::: {.work-card-title}
[A Federated Knowledge Graph Architecture for Dutch Cadastral Data](works/federated-kg-cadastral.qmd)
:::

::: {.work-card-meta}
EDOC 2026
:::

Proposes a federated virtual knowledge graph architecture that enables interoperable querying over Dutch cadastral data sources without centralizing the underlying datasets.
:::

::: {.work-card-footer}
[View →](works/federated-kg-cadastral.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
::: {.work-card}
::: {.work-card-body}
[Conference paper]{.badge-type}
[Under Review]{.badge-type}

::: {.work-card-title}
[Who Lives Where?](works/who-lives-where.qmd)
:::

::: {.work-card-meta}
EDOC Forum 2026
:::

Investigates how authoritative residential registration data can be queried and reasoned over in a knowledge graph setting, with a focus on data quality and federated access.
:::

::: {.work-card-footer}
[View →](works/who-lives-where.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::
:::
:::

:::
